22229.desc: These ashen remains of an exiled soul pulse faintly with the echo of a once-promising life.

22605.name: Craftsman's Writ - Wicked Leather Headband
22605.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22608.name: Craftsman's Writ - Runic Leather Pants
22608.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22615.name: Craftsman's Writ - Gnomish Battle Chicken
22615.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22618.name: Craftsman's Writ - Major Healing Potion
22618.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22619.name: Craftsman's Writ - Greater Frost Protection Potion
22619.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22625.name: Craftsman's Writ - Baked Salmon
22625.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22626.name: Craftsman's Writ - Runn Tum Tuber Surprise
22626.desc: Bears the seal of the Argent Dawn.

22723.name: A Letter from the Keeper of the Rolls
22723.desc: The indelible mark of the Argent Dawn is pressed clearly into the wax of the seal.

22726.name: Splinter of Atiesh
22726.desc: A splinter of Atiesh, Greatstaff of the Guardian.

22736.name: Andonisus, Reaper of Souls
22736.desc: This blade is dimensional. It appears to be fading from this plane of existence.

22737.name: Atiesh, Greatstaff of the Guardian
22737.desc: An entity of great evil is imprisoned within the staff.

23720.name: Swift Riding Turtle
23720.desc: Slow and steady might not always win you the race but it'll get you there... eventually.

24281.name: Carved Ivory Bone
24281.desc: Looks like the carving was never finished...

41011.name: Wooden Gryphon Carving
41011.desc: "For paps." is etched on the gryphon figure.

41063.name: Doctor's Labcoat
41063.desc: It would be wise to not question the stains on this thing.

41132.name: Tarnished Mace
41132.desc: The initials L.B. are engraved on the hilt.

50049.name: Treasure Seeker's Torch
50049.desc: Never miss a chest in the dark!

50056.name: City Protector's Medallion
50056.desc: Sends you to your capital city. You must become a City Protector to use this item.

50068.name: Green Water Snake
50068.desc: Brought to Sparkwater Port aboard merchant ships, these short-lived reptiles are considered pests by the port's residents.

50069.name: Scarlet Snake
50069.desc: Brave assassins sometimes capture these critters to use their highly toxic venom to poison weapons.

50076.name: Turquoise Tallstrider
50076.desc: A rare and exotic bird, with feathers as bright as the tropical seas.

50078.name: Dart Frog
50078.desc: Toads and frogs are fast friends of trolls, perfect for poisons.

50079.name: Island Frog
50079.desc: This little friend snuck into your boot to join you on your travels.

50081.name: Cottontail Rabbit
50081.desc: Mountain cottontails can leap up a steep incline with speed you would not believe.

50085.name: Frostwolf Ghostpup
50085.desc: The little wolf told to stay. Watching, waiting, for vacant prey. Too proud to leave, she slipped away. Unburdened now, forever free to play.

50113.name: Night Elf Hair Dye: Dark Blue

50202.name: Egg of Turtlhu
50202.desc: This poor turtle got a bit corrupted, but his heart is still lovely.

50204.name: Wildhammer I [Dwarf]
50204.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

50233.name: Wooden Club
50233.desc: A simple stick made of wood.

50243.name: Pompa's Scratching Stick
50243.desc: Only a madman would scratch with this.

50250.name: Wildhammer II [Dwarf]
50250.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

50251.name: Wildhammer III [Dwarf]
50251.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

50252.name: Wildhammer IV [Dwarf]
50252.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

50745.name: Glyph of Self-Restraint
50745.desc: This glyph prevents you from gambling.

50746.name: Glyph of the Honorless
50746.desc: I PvP for fun! This glyph prevents you from gaining honor.

51002.name: Green Steam Tonk
51002.desc: A favorite of children across Azeroth, this tough little toy can withstand even the most aggressive imagination.

51003.name: Purple Steam Tonk
51003.desc: Summon and control your steam tonk.

51010.name: Dark [Troll]
51010.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

51050.name: S.W.A.G Goggles
51050.desc: I wear my goggles at night.

51057.name: Glyph of the Frostsaber
51057.desc: While active, your Cat Form will take the appearance of a Frostsaber.

51201.name: Illusion: Worgen
51201.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

51205.name: Illusion: Ghost
51205.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

51206.name: Illusion: Banshee
51206.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

51210.name: Illusion: Green Dragonkin
51210.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

51215.name: Illusion: Satyr
51215.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

51220.name: Lost Farm Sheep
51220.desc: A friendly farm sheep that wandered away from its flock, it now follows you faithfully, providing a comforting presence in the midst of your adventures.

51230.name: Glyph of the Turtle
51230.desc: You lose 5% of your experience on death and you get half experience from creature kills.

51250.name: Miniature Winter Veil Tree
51250.desc: Summon a Winter Veil Tree with fluffy branches and beautiful bright lights!

51264.name: Blast Shield
51264.desc: Protects you from explosions, conditions may apply.

51267.name: Spicy Beef Burrito
51267.desc: Also known as a 'pizza bottle', apparently.

51312.name: Portable Wormhole Generator: Stormwind
51312.desc: Technologically advanced energy-matter scrambler. Insert a coin to continue!

51313.name: Portable Wormhole Generator: Orgrimmar
51313.desc: Technologically advanced energy-matter scrambler. Insert a coin to continue!

51325.name: Elwynn Pumpkin
51325.desc: Plump. Quite ready to be made into pie.

51332.name: Gramma Stonefield's Lantern
51332.desc: Bright enough to not get lost in the woods.

51360.name: Glyph of the Emerald Bear
51360.desc: While active, your Bear Form will take the appearance of an Emerald Bear.

51362.name: Glyph of the Dream Panther
51362.desc: While active, your Cat Form will take the appearance of a Dream Panther.

51425.name: Teresa's Copper Coin
51425.desc: I'm not very lucky. Throw this coin in a fountain for me?

51431.name: Glyph of the Frostkin
51431.desc: While active, your Moonkin Form will take the appearance of a Frostkin.

51432.name: Glyph of Stars
51432.desc: While active, your Moonkin Form will take the appearance of an Astral Form.

51606.name: Felicia's Silver Coin
51606.desc: Style is a way to say who you are without having to speak.

51619.name: Uther Lightbringer's Gold Coin
51619.desc: Young Arthas must learn patience to temper his power. I will pray that he one day learns how to lead with care rather than force.

51629.name: Aurelian's Silver Coin
51629.desc: By the power of the Lich… err, Light, burn!

51637.name: Inflatable Thunderfury, Blessed Blade of the Windseeker

51639.name: Smultron's Shades
51639.desc: I wear my goggles at night!

51705.name: Simple Wooden Planter
51705.desc: Specially handcrafted planter with fertile and watered soil.

51706.name: Country Pumpkin Seeds
51706.desc: Can be planted in Simple Wooden Planter. Requires watering and fertilizing.

51708.name: Striped Melon Seeds
51708.desc: The sweetest sort ever known! Can be planted in Simple Wooden Planter. Requires watering and fertilizing.

51709.name: Farmer's Guidebook: Surviving on the Land!
51709.desc: How to select and grow the best varieties of all time!

51716.name: Magic Mushroom Spores
51716.desc: Delicious and completely absent of  psychedelic properties.

51755.name: Rune of the Wildhammer Clan
51755.desc: You can hear crackling thunder within.

51759.name: Siege Bomber
51759.desc: Comes with an underbarrel bomb launcher.

51792.name: Otherworldly Robe
51792.desc: This robe is emblazoned with runes you've never seen before. The way it is woven seems as if it were from another world.

51844.name: Stunning Crossbow
51844.desc: Cock the bow, aim, and fire!

51848.name: Ancient Elven Robes
51848.desc: A relic of the times of reckless magic use.

51849.name: Thunderhorn
51849.desc: Infused with the power of a Thunder Lizard.

51855.name: Dirty Old Ring
51855.desc: It's so light, it almost slipped out of your hand.

51862.name: Brave's Rifle
51862.desc: Shu'halo warriors nickname this gun "Greenboy" for the way the sun reflects off it.

51890.name: Adventurer's Shirt
51890.desc: A gift received during Turtle WoW's Open House event in 2020.

51898.name: Fearless Traveler's Shirt
51898.desc: December 1, 2021 — I scared C'thun into a heart attack and all I got was this lousy shirt!

51899.name: Frostweave Shirt of Frozen Souls
51899.desc: October 4, 2021 —  Kel'Thuzad has been defeated for the first time!

53008.name: Illusion: Two-headed Ogre
53008.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

54000.name: Azure Frog
54000.desc: A mystical amphibian known for its soothing croaks, said to bring tranquility to those who listen.

54001.name: Dream Frog
54001.desc: This ethereal creature is believed to possess the ability to enter the dreams of sleeping adventurers, offering them guidance and wisdom.

54002.name: Bullfrog
54002.desc: A robust amphibian with a powerful croak, often found near bodies of water, revered by some as a symbol of strength and resilience.

54003.name: Infinite Frog
54003.desc: A peculiar frog that seems to defy the laws of time and space, hopping effortlessly between dimensions.

54004.name: Poison Frog
54004.desc: Beware the vibrant hues of this deadly amphibian, as its skin secretes a potent toxin capable of incapacitating even the mightiest of foes.

54005.name: Snow Frog
54005.desc: Native to the frigid regions of Azeroth, this hardy frog has adapted to survive in icy environments, its azure skin camouflaging it against the snowy landscapes.

54006.name: Pink Frog
54006.desc: Delicate and enchanting, this rare frog species captivates with its vibrant pink hue, believed to bring good fortune and prosperity to its owner.

54007.name: Golden Frog
54007.desc: Legend has it that this shimmering amphibian is a harbinger of wealth and abundance.

54008.name: Pond Frog
54008.desc: A common sight in tranquil ponds and marshes, this unassuming frog is a reminder of the simple joys found in nature's embrace.

59990.name: Shabby Letter
59990.desc: A slightly torn and dirty letter.

60098.name: Hypertech Battery Pack
60098.desc: Provides power for the newest technological inventions. Unlimited power!

60100.name: Family Locket
60100.desc: A necklace with an old family crest engraved on it

60131.name: Scepter of Aka'sha
60131.desc: The Scepter of a temple long forgotten

60132.name: Talisman of Kar'noom
60132.desc: Ancient Talisman of a long gone sage

60172.name: Sharn's Head
60172.desc: Severed Head of the Pack Leader Sharn

60174.name: Letter from Duke
60174.desc: A sealed letter addressed to Duchess Grelda.

60197.name: Storn's Head
60197.desc: The head of the bandit lord Storn

60281.name: Glittering Green Scale
60281.desc: Shimmering in a bright green magic.

60293.name: Untempered Runeblade
60293.desc: A dark voiceless power beckons you to pick up this blade.

60314.name: Scroll of Blessing
60314.desc: Contains written scriptures in bright golden ink

60378.name: Salorn's Ring
60378.desc: Encrusted with a large amethyst and bearing the mark of the Kirin Tor.

60393.name: Shield of Mathela
60393.desc: Belonged to the maiden of the Light.

60436.name: Sightless Leather Hood
60436.desc: The lack of sight heightens other senses.

60476.name: Pristine Gorrila Pelt
60476.desc: In mint condition, and completely pristine.

60486.name: Fishbringer
60486.desc: Glimmers with the pure energy of the light, is it alive?

60491.name: The Moo Stone
60491.desc: The images of the reign of cows can be seen within. It burns deep within your mind, the power is almost overwhelming.

60517.name: Tarnished Necklace
60517.desc: This silver necklace has been worn by the elements. Under the grime, glittering sapphires adorn undulating tendrils that resemble the rays of the sun branching from the golden disk at its center.

60587.name: Tharg's Rock of Friendship
60587.desc: To new friend! Tharg love you.

60622.name: Ring of the Academy
60622.desc: Rewarded on Behalf of the Academy of Arcane Arts and Sciences

60703.name: Torn Union Flyer
60703.desc: Depicts a miner pointing at you, urging you to join the union.

60705.name: Cracked Power Core
60705.desc: A green liquid is slowly oozing out of the crack.

60739.name: Tarnished Lancelot Ring
60739.desc: Bearing the crest of a forgotten family.

60804.name: Shade of Reminisce
60804.desc: Its shadow reminds you of your own.

60860.name: Triskelion of Roving Elements
60860.desc: Pulses impatiently when you stop moving.

60872.name: Firecracker Trousers
60872.desc: Said to be Nazz's backup pair.

60885.name: Dar'kar of the Third Khan
60885.desc: The mighty long-axe once wielded during the time of the third khan.

60915.name: Band of Durotar
60915.desc: In dedication to acts of heroism during the Second Battle of Durotar.

60916.name: Signet of Durotar
60916.desc: In dedication to acts of heroism during the Second Battle of Durotar.

60917.name: Ring of Durotar
60917.desc: In dedication to acts of heroism during the Second Battle of Durotar.

60925.name: Stormstout Surprise Stein
60925.desc: This enchanted Stein never seems to run out of Chen’s surprise brew!

61100.name: Deckmaster's Commendation
61100.desc: In service to the Kul Tiran navy.

61104.name: Demon [Night Elf, male only]
61104.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

61156.name: Headband of a Hundred Feathers
61156.desc: Seems to have lost a few.

61187.name: Intricate Gyroscope Goggles
61187.desc: Interlocking mechanisms increase sight picture at long ranges!

61218.name: Recipe: Elixir of Greater Nature Power

61263.name: Tooth of the Packlord
61263.desc: No stranger to chewing through heavy armor.

61308.name: Gavel of Gilnean Justice
61308.desc: An artifact that holds the final say in Gilnean law.

61517.name: Chimaera's Eye
61517.desc: This magical gem seems to slowly exude a corossive poison that no armor of man nor monster can endure.

61520.name: The Golden Banana
61520.desc: Holds power over the apekind, yet it's afflicted with a terrible curse.

61534.name: Fisher's Harpoon
61534.desc: I wonder where the fisher is...

61545.name: Shadeflayer's Sigil
61545.desc: Strengthened by the mojo of many trolls.

61572.name: Gartside Family Wrench
61572.desc: Lodged in the side of the prototype, this wrench has seen better days.

61577.name: Lieutenant's Sword
61577.desc: The initials L.P. are etched on the hilt.

61687.name: Noble's Pendant
61687.desc: The magic is all but faded.

61772.name: Vorgendor: Myths from the Blood Dimension

65029.name: Outline: Murloc Flippers
65029.desc: These things really make you swim fast!

65031.name: Outline: Repaired Electro-Lantern
65031.desc: Your savior when the oil runs out.

65105.name: Scale of the Wakener
65105.desc: One must wait so the rest may sleep.

70033.name: Tazan's Tusk
70033.desc: A claimed trophy from an enemy.

70035.name: Rusty Shovel
70035.desc: The initials S.Y. are scribbled on the handle.

70045.name: Rusty Shovel
70045.desc: Engraved on the handle are two letters, S.Y.

70054.name: Wyrmheart Boots
70054.desc: Big enough to fit a dragon heart.

80006.name: Arcane Elemental
80006.desc: In case of darkness, this little elemental is an infinite source of a soothing blue glow.

80446.name: Armored Nightsaber
80446.desc: When a night elf's mount perishes, it is custom for the rider to keep one of the saber's great fangs as a token of remembrance.

80648.name: Illusion: Gnoll
80648.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

80654.name: High Elf Hair Dye: Wheat Brown

80715.name: Gloves of the Lifted Cup
80715.desc: Cheers! May our reign over this keep be endless.

80724.name: Cell Heater
80724.desc: Keeps you warm through the coldest nights.

80745.name: Abomination Crossbow
80745.desc: Made from abomination ribs and stitching. Truly horrifying.

80784.name: Unbroken Prisoner's Cuffs
80784.desc: The damned  man's fortitude and power of will still echoes within the metal...

80805.name: Prismatic Crystal
80805.desc: Always changing colors, never the same.

80824.name: Narillasanz's Tooth
80824.desc: A fiery rune is etched on the tooth.

80840.name: Obsidian Sphere
80840.desc: An endless flicker is trapped inside the sphere.

81118.name: Shellcoin
81118.desc: Property of the Shell Co. Trading Company. Buy buy buy! Hurry before the market value skyrockets!

81145.name: Illusion: Pandaren
81145.desc: This disguise will work until logout.

81151.name: Spectral Faeling
81151.desc: This unique species of faerie dragon is not usually found on Azeroth.

81158.name: Armored Frostmane Bear
81158.desc: This ursine mount's swiftness is enhanced by its heavy armor.

81185.name: Aerie Peak Gryphon
81185.desc: Gryphons' keen eyesight allows them to see over vast distances and warn their riders of any dangers that lie ahead.

81186.name: Armored Aerie Peak Gryphon
81186.desc: This noble gryphon is as staunch a battle companion as any a member of the Alliance could ask for.

81191.name: Green Shredder X-0524B
81191.desc: The destructive nature of goblins is best characterized by their shredders.

81193.name: Blue Scrapforged Mechaspider
81193.desc: The check engine light is always on, it's when it goes off that you should be worried.

81194.name: Green Scrapforged Mechaspider
81194.desc: This mechaspider specializes in drilling, clamping, and shooting at the same time. A typical gnome invention.

81195.name: Red Scrapforged Mechaspider
81195.desc: Four-legged machine of destruction, for your riding pleasure.

81225.name: Armored Stormwind Warhorse
81225.desc: Trained to withstand brutal hand-to-hand combat in the fiercest battlefields.

81232.name: Azure Frostsaber
81232.desc: The lack of spots or stripes marks this beast as a descendant of the most ancient frostsaber line.

81233.name: Armored Ironforge Ram
81233.desc: Wildhammer Fact Checker claims that this specific breed was the first type of ram domesticated by the dwarves when they settled in Dun Morogh.

81237.name: Chieftain's Kodo
81237.desc: This Kodo with a Ceremonial Attire is usually reserved for Clan Chieftains, but after the Tauren joined the Horde, they have been made available to Champions of Thunderbluff.

81238.name: Turbo-Charged Flying Machine
81238.desc: Only the most talented engineers have the courage and the mental stamina to create a flying machine that boasts stability and safety. Turbo-charging one is just crazy!

81243.name: Beaky
81243.desc: A gift from the Wildhammer dwarves to the heroes of the Alliance, these hatchlings are descendants of the same gryphons ridden by Falstad and his entourage into Grim Batol.

81248.name: Finn the Shark
81248.desc: Big and safe to have at your side if you want to discover the world underneath the sea.

81252.name: Reinforced Green Pounder
81252.desc: A fearsome war machine, built to withstand the harshest of battles.

81254.name: Water Waveling
81254.desc: This Elemental has been formed personally by Duke Hydraxis as thanks for your help in fighting the Sulfuran Firelords.

81283.name: Mr. Bigglesworth
81283.desc: Upon exiting the freezing necropolis of Naxxramas, Mr. Bigglesworth promptly found a warm spot in the sun to take a long nap in.

81284.name: Zeppelin Cargo
81284.desc: It seems to have survived the crash intact... mostly.

81303.name: 'Shard of Elune'
81303.desc: A small piece of glowing rock, that can supposedly grant the bearer with extreme luck, power and energy!

81304.name: 'Queen Azshara's Crown'
81304.desc: A simple silver crown with a green jewel inlaid, it is mildly aged, and has a few chips upon the surface.

81334.name: Salt Tooth's Head
81334.desc: There doesn't seem to be a 'salty' tooth.

81336.name: Tarlo's Crate
81336.desc: It has a note attached to the top.

81350.name: The Longshank
81350.desc: Long enough for a good shank!

81363.name: Staff of Azure Domination
81363.desc: The staff of the Dragonflight holds dominion over magic

81364.name: Scale of Malygos
81364.desc: A scale of the Blue Dragon Aspect

81365.name: Kargron's Leggings
81365.desc: Worn and scarred from ages of battle.

81367.name: Band of the Old Horde
81367.desc: Etched with symbols of the Blackrock Clan

81369.name: Blade of the Blademaster
81369.desc: The blade is perfectly balanced for warfare.

81376.name: Moontouched Girdle
81376.desc: Glimmers with the blessing of the moon

81379.name: Shard of the Moon
81379.desc: Glimmers in the moonlight with potent power

81383.name: The Ogre Truncheon
81383.desc: Authority comes from a good thwacking

81408.name: Swiftgear's Engineering Schematics
81408.desc: It all seems to be written in gibberish.

81502.name: Sun-Blessed Shard of Renewal
81502.desc: A shard of pure light with incredible healing capabilities.

83000.name: Chronoboon Displacer
83000.desc: Alters the fabric of time, suspending beneficial world effects from dragonslaying, Dire Maul, Zul'Gurub, Darkmoon Faire, Warchief's Blessing, and Felwood.

83091.name: Frost Affinity [Human, male only]
83091.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

83092.name: Naturalist I [Night Elf]
83092.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

83099.name: Naturalist II [Night Elf]
83099.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

83100.name: Naturalist III [Night Elf, male only]
83100.desc: This token will alter your character's skin, while leaving the haircut, hair color, and facial features unchanged.

83150.name: Big Turtle WoW Bear
83150.desc: The Murloc rider on its back is a skilled warrior! He is a proud member of the Turtle WoW community, and he is always ready to defend his server against any threat.

83152.name: Green Spectral Tiger
83152.desc: A rare and elusive mount, the Green Spectral Tiger is said to be blessed by the spirits of the forest. Those who ride it are said to have a connection to nature itself.

83224.name: Horn of Engryss
83224.desc: Marked with furbolg symbols, and used to rally the tribes

83259.name: Old Knighthood Blade
83259.desc: Put in service to the first Knight's of Lordaeron

83261.name: Tome of the First Scripture
83261.desc: Contains many holy scriptures of the Light

83263.name: Cuffs of the Justicar
83263.desc: Created with the purpose of dispensing justice

83264.name: Ring of Sacrifice
83264.desc: A tribute to the lost souls

83265.name: Demon Hunter's Blindfold
83265.desc: To become sightless, is to see the demonic.

83267.name: Bracers of the Demonic Hunt
83267.desc: Surging with the power to destroy.

83277.name: Dark Iron Adventurer Shawl
83277.desc: Tattered and worn, it has seen better days.

83278.name: Ash Explorer Pauldrons
83278.desc: Covered in a heavy layer of ash.

83487.name: Blade of the Fallen Star
83487.desc: Forged from the remnants of a fallen star eons ago.

83554.name: Abyssal Flame
83554.desc: Some otherworldly essence lingers around the flame, bending it in mysterious ways.

83555.name: Abyssal Slate
83555.desc: The mere sight of it tells you something is terribly wrong about this.

83556.name: Abyssal Wind
83556.desc: Holding the unusually heavy orb dulls your senses.

83557.name: Abyssal Wave
83557.desc: The liquid seems to be flowing up, as if its trying to break free.

83571.name: Codex: Shadow Mend
83571.desc: Even in darkness there is salvation.

84005.name: Blindfold of the Scarlet Marksman
84005.desc: Those that blinded are those that truly see.

84039.name: Tinsel's Carrot
84039.desc: A gesture of good faith from a snowman. Maybe you're not on Greatfather Winter's naughty list after all!

91780.name: Lovely Green Shirt
91780.desc: During the first week of the Turtle WoW server launch in China, we would like to give each of you a small welcome gift to thank you for your support!
